name: SideNavigationComponent
description:
The side-navigation is a wrapping component representing
a left navigation that can always display or expand/collapse using the menu icon within the global navigation.

inputs.name: collapseWidth
inputs.description: The screen width, in pixels, at which to automatically collapse the side navigation on window resize.

inputs.name: dynamicWidth
inputs.description: Prevents the side navigation from truncating or wrapping, extending the width to its longest label.

inputs.name: inShellbar
inputs.description: Whether the sidenav is used with shellbar.

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether this side nav should display in mobile (fullscreen) mode.

inputs.name: narrow
inputs.description: Whether this side nav should display as narrow. Note this can only be used with side nav items that have icons.

inputs.name: showScrollButtons
inputs.description: Whether to show the scroll buttons in narrow mode. When set to false, default scrollbar behavior will be used.

inputs.name: sideNavigationConfiguration
inputs.description: Side navigation configuration, to pass whole model object, instead of creating HTML from scratch
